title: Ghost Post
description: A post represents a piece of content in a Ghost publication, including blog posts and newsletter content. Posts support rich content via the Lexical editor format, SEO metadata, social sharing metadata, content visibility controls, and associations with authors and tags.

uuid.description: Universally unique identifier for the post

slug.description: URL-safe slug derived from the title, used in the post URL

lexical.description: Post content in Lexical editor format, stored as a JSON string

html.description: Rendered HTML content of the post

plaintext.description: Plain text representation of the post content

comment_id.description: Identifier used by the commenting system

feature_image.description: URL of the featured image displayed at the top of the post

feature_image_alt.description: Alt text for the featured image for accessibility

feature_image_caption.description: Caption displayed below the featured image

featured.description: Whether the post is marked as featured for prominent display

visibility.description: Controls which audience can access the full post content

created_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the post was created

updated_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the post was last updated, required for edit operations to prevent collisions

published_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the post was published or is scheduled to be published

custom_excerpt.description: Custom excerpt to override the auto-generated excerpt

codeinjection_head.description: Custom code injected into the HTML head on the post page

codeinjection_foot.description: Custom code injected before the closing body tag on the post page

custom_template.description: Name of a custom Handlebars template to use for rendering the post

canonical_url.description: Canonical URL for the post, used when content is syndicated from another source

url.description: Full URL of the post on the Ghost site

excerpt.description: Auto-generated excerpt from the beginning of the post content

reading_time.description: Estimated reading time in minutes based on word count

access.description: Whether the current request has access to the full post content based on visibility settings

email_subject.description: Custom subject line when sending the post as a newsletter email

frontmatter.description: Custom frontmatter data for the post

og_image.description: Open Graph image URL used when the post is shared on social platforms

og_title.description: Open Graph title for social sharing

og_description.description: Open Graph description for social sharing

meta_title.description: Custom SEO meta title for search engine results

meta_description.description: Custom SEO meta description for search engine results

tags.description: Tags associated with the post for categorization

authors.description: Authors of the post, at least one author is always present

primary_author.description: The primary (first) author of the post

primary_tag.description: The primary (first) tag of the post

Tag.description: A tag for organizing and categorizing content in Ghost

feature_image.description: Featured image URL for the tag page

visibility.description: Visibility of the tag, internal tags have slugs starting with hash

url.description: Full URL of the tag page

Author.description: A staff user who creates content in the Ghost publication

cover_image.description: Cover image URL for the author page

url.description: Full URL of the author page
